title: Evo Design System from eBay
content: Evo from Directories: Components: eBay Evo Design System is the definitive guide for creating seamless and impactful experiences across the eBay ecosystem. It encompasses thoughtfully designed principles, detailed guidelines, and a robust library of reusable components. eBay Design System serves as a centralized resource hub, promoting consistency, efficiency, and collaboration among teams. By empowering creators to deliver intuitive and user-friendly solutions, it drives innovation and enhances the experience for millions of eBay buyers and sellers worldwide.
